summary: Iteration 5 testing: JWT Authentication feature fully tested. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend all auth flows working correctly - login, register, logout, protected routes, token storage in localStorage, club name display in topbar and sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext: Clean implementation with proper token management in localStorage. Uses 'kpi-token' as storage key.
AuthPage: Good data-testid attributes for testability. Tab switching between Connexion/Inscription works correctly.
ProtectedRoute: Properly redirects unauthenticated users to /auth with loading spinner during auth check.
Layout: Club name displayed in both topbar (header) and sidebar user section. Logout button properly clears token.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with prefix 'TEST_' and 'uitest_'. Existing test user: test@crossfit.ch / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All JWT auth features verified: (1) POST /api/auth/register creates new user with email, password, club_name and returns JWT token. (2) POST /api/auth/login authenticates with email/password and returns JWT token. (3) GET /api/auth/me returns current user info (requires Bearer token). (4) PUT /api/auth/club-name updates club name (authenticated). (5) AuthPage shows Connexion/Inscription tabs with proper form fields. (6) Club name input only visible on Inscription (register) tab. (7) After login/register, redirects to / dashboard. (8) JWT token stored in localStorage as 'kpi-token'. (9) Token sent via axios Authorization header. (10) Logout clears token and redirects to /auth. (11) Protected routes (/, /transactions, /recurring, /categories, /settings) redirect to /auth when not authenticated. (12) Club name displayed in topbar (header) next to user icon. (13) Email and club name displayed in sidebar user section. (14) Logout button in sidebar with 'Déconnexion' label.

features_tested.auth_page_login_tab: PASS - Shows email, password fields with 'Se connecter' button
features_tested.auth_page_register_tab: PASS - Shows email, password, club name fields with 'Créer mon compte' button
features_tested.register_new_user: PASS - Creates account and redirects to dashboard
features_tested.redirect_after_login: PASS - Navigates to / (dashboard) after successful login
features_tested.redirect_after_register: PASS - Navigates to / (dashboard) after successful registration
features_tested.club_name_in_topbar: PASS - Club name displayed in header with user icon
features_tested.club_name_in_sidebar: PASS - Club name and email shown in sidebar user section
features_tested.logout_button: PASS - Logout button in sidebar clears token and redirects to /auth
features_tested.token_in_localStorage: PASS - JWT token stored as 'kpi-token' starting with 'eyJ'
features_tested.protected_routes_redirect: PASS - All 5 routes (/, /transactions, /recurring, /categories, /settings) redirect to /auth when unauthenticated
